# S04: Homepage — Pixel Perfect + Live Data

**Goal:** Homepage matches the `storefront-homepage.html` wireframe at 1440px and 390px with all six sections rendering, TrendingStrip wired to live trending data (with curated fallback), and GameSelectorGrid already wired to live listing counts.
**Demo:** Homepage renders Hero → GameSelectorGrid (live counts) → TrendingStrip (curated/live cards) → TrustSection → SellerCTABanner with correct padding, typography, and breakpoints matching the wireframe at both breakpoints.

## Must-Haves

- Hero section padding matches wireframe: `80px 48px 64px` desktop, `48px 20px 40px` mobile
- Hero subtitle `margin-bottom: 40px`, game tabs `margin-bottom: 36px`, stats pill `margin-bottom: 36px`
- GameSelectorGrid section padding `64px 48px` desktop / `40px 20px` mobile, grid breakpoint at `md` (768px) not `sm` (640px)
- GameTile overlay padding `24px` desktop / `16px` mobile
- TrendingStrip rendered on homepage with 🔥 emoji prefix, `48px` horizontal padding desktop / `20px` mobile, card width `180px` desktop / `140px` mobile
- `fetchTrendingCards()` function in customer-backend.ts following `fetchGameListingCounts()` pattern with 5-min cache
- Curated `TRENDING_PLACEHOLDER` data with real card images so TrendingStrip always renders even when API returns empty
- TrustSection padding `64px 48px` desktop / `40px 20px` mobile, trust card padding `36px 28px` desktop / `24px 20px` mobile
- SellerCTABanner margin/padding: `0 48px` outer margin, `56px 48px` inner padding desktop; `0 20px` / `40px 24px` mobile
- All existing homepage tests pass plus new tests for trending data integration

## Verification

- `cd storefront && npx vitest run src/components/homepage/` — all homepage component tests pass
- `cd storefront && npx vitest run` — full suite passes (738+ tests)
- `cd storefront && npm run build` — production build succeeds

## Tasks

- [ ] **T01: Align all homepage components to wireframe pixel values** `est:45m`
- [ ] **T02: Wire TrendingStrip to live data with curated fallback and integrate into homepage** `est:45m`
- [ ] **T03: Fix orphaned CardDetailPage v5.1 tests** `est:10m`

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>SideDecked — Storefront Homepage Wireframe</title>
  <script src="https://mcp.figma.com/mcp/html-to-design/capture.js" async></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* =============================================
       VOLTAGE DESIGN TOKENS (dark mode only)
       ============================================= */
    :root {
      --brand-primary: #8B5CF6;
      --brand-secondary: #FF7849;
      --bg-base: #09090F;
      --bg-surface-1: #18162A;
      --bg-surface-2: #21203A;
      --bg-surface-3: #2C2A4A;
      --bg-surface-4: #38365C;
      --text-primary: #F0EEFF;
      --text-secondary: #B8B0D8;
      --text-tertiary: #7B72A8;
      --border-default: #2C2A4A;
      --border-strong: #4A4680;
      --positive: #10B981;
      --negative: #EF4444;
      --warning: #F59E0B;
      --interactive: #8B5CF6;
      --game-mtg: #A78BFA;
      --game-pokemon: #FCD34D;
      --game-ygo: #60A5FA;
      --game-op: #34D399;
      --font-display: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
      --font-heading: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    }

    /* =============================================
       GLOBAL RESET + CANVAS
       ============================================= */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      background: #060608;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    }

    /* =============================================
       CANVAS LAYOUT — side-by-side frames
       ============================================= */
    .canvas {
      display: flex;
      gap: 48px;
      padding: 48px;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    .frame-wrapper {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .frame-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      padding: 6px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    /* Desktop frame */
    .desktop-frame {
      width: 1440px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
    }

    /* Mobile frame */
    .mobile-frame {
      width: 390px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 40px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 3px solid var(--bg-surface-3);
      box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.06);
      position: relative;
    }
    .mobile-frame::before {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 120px;
      height: 28px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 0 0 20px 20px;
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      z-index: 100;
      border: 3px solid var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-top: none;
    }
    .mobile-inner {
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 37px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       ANNOTATIONS
       ============================================= */
    .annotation {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.08);
      border: 1px dashed rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      white-space: nowrap;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .annotation--api {
      color: var(--positive);
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.08);
      border-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
    }
    .annotation--breakpoint {
      color: var(--warning);
      background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08);
      border-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3);
    }

    /* =============================================
       SHARED COMPONENT STYLES
       ============================================= */

    /* --- Hero --- */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      padding: 80px 48px 64px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -200px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 1000px;
      height: 600px;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15) 0%, rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.06) 40%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-inner {
      position: relative;
      max-width: 1344px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .hero h1 {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 72px;
      line-height: 0.95;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .hero h1 .text-violet {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6, #A78BFA);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }
    .hero h1 .text-coral {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF7849, #FFB088);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }
    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 18px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      max-width: 560px;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    /* Hero search bar */
    .hero-search {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 680px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .hero-search-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 14px 20px;
      background: rgba(24, 22, 42, 0.60);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: 16px;
    }
    .hero-search-bar svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .hero-search-bar input {
      flex: 1;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      outline: none;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 16px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .hero-search-bar input::placeholder {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .hero-search-bar .search-submit {
      padding: 8px 20px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border: none;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      color: white;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.15s;
    }
    .hero-search-bar .search-submit:hover {
      background: #7C3AED;
    }

    /* Game filter tabs */
    .game-tabs {
      display: flex;
      gap: 4px;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 36px;
    }
    .game-tab {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 6px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .game-tab:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); color: var(--text-primary); }
    .game-tab.active {
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12);
      border-color: var(--brand-primary);
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .game-tab--mtg.active   { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.12); border-color: var(--game-mtg); color: var(--game-mtg); }
    .game-tab--poke.active  { background: rgba(252,211,77,0.12); border-color: var(--game-pokemon); color: var(--game-pokemon); }
    .game-tab--ygo.active   { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.12); border-color: var(--game-ygo); color: var(--game-ygo); }
    .game-tab--op.active    { background: rgba(52,211,153,0.12); border-color: var(--game-op); color: var(--game-op); }

    /* Stats card */
    .hero-stats {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 24px;
      padding: 14px 28px;
      background: rgba(24, 22, 42, 0.50);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: 999px;
      margin-bottom: 36px;
    }
    .hero-stat {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .hero-stat strong {
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .hero-stat-sep {
      width: 1px;
      height: 16px;
      background: var(--border-default);
    }

    /* CTA buttons */
    .hero-ctas {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .btn {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 12px 28px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s;
      text-decoration: none;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: white;
      box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.25);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      background: #7C3AED;
      box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.35);
    }
    .btn-outline-coral {
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--brand-secondary);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--brand-secondary);
    }
    .btn-outline-coral:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.08);
    }

    /* --- Game Selector Grid --- */
    .section { padding: 64px 48px; }
    .section-inner { max-width: 1344px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .section-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .section-label .annotation { margin-left: 12px; }
    .game-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .game-card {
      position: relative;
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .game-card:hover {
      transform: scale(1.02);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }
    .game-card-bg {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
    }
    .game-card-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      padding: 24px;
    }
    .game-card--mtg .game-card-overlay   { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(167,139,250,0.10) 0%, rgba(167,139,250,0.55) 100%); }
    .game-card--poke .game-card-overlay  { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(252,211,77,0.08) 0%, rgba(252,211,77,0.50) 100%); }
    .game-card--ygo .game-card-overlay   { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(96,165,250,0.10) 0%, rgba(96,165,250,0.55) 100%); }
    .game-card--op .game-card-overlay    { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(52,211,153,0.08) 0%, rgba(52,211,153,0.50) 100%); }

    .game-card-bg--mtg  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a103a 0%, #2d1b69 100%); }
    .game-card-bg--poke { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a08 0%, #3d3000 100%); }
    .game-card-bg--ygo  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #081a30 0%, #0d2b5e 100%); }
    .game-card-bg--op   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #081a14 0%, #0d3d2b 100%); }

    /* Pattern decoration on game cards */
    .game-card-bg::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 70% 60%, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 0%, transparent 50%);
    }

    .game-card-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 22px;
      color: white;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .game-card-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    }

    /* Hover glow annotation */
    .game-card .hover-note {
      position: absolute;
      top: 12px;
      right: 12px;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }
    .game-card:hover .hover-note { opacity: 1; }

    /* --- Trending Cards Strip --- */
    .trending-strip {
      padding: 48px 0;
    }
    .trending-strip .section-label {
      padding: 0 48px;
    }
    .trending-scroll {
      display: flex;
      gap: 20px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      padding: 0 48px 16px;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: var(--bg-surface-3) transparent;
    }
    .trending-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 4px; }
    .trending-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .trending-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--bg-surface-3); border-radius: 4px; }

    .trending-card {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 180px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.15s;
    }
    .trending-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
    .trending-card-img {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5 / 7;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }
    .trending-card-img .card-art-placeholder {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--bg-surface-2) 0%, var(--bg-surface-3) 100%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .trending-card-img .card-art-placeholder svg {
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      opacity: 0.4;
    }
    .trending-card-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 2px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .trending-card-set {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .trending-card-price {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--positive);
    }

    /* --- Trust Section --- */
    .trust-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .trust-card {
      padding: 36px 28px;
      background: rgba(24, 22, 42, 0.40);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: 16px;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .trust-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 120px;
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--brand-primary), transparent);
    }
    .trust-card-icon {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.10);
      border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 16px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);

    .trust-card-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
    .trust-card-value {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 32px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .trust-card-label {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* --- Seller CTA Banner --- */
    .seller-cta {
      margin: 0 48px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 56px 48px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-primary), var(--brand-secondary));
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .seller-cta::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      right: -100px;
      width: 400px;
      height: 400px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .seller-cta h2 {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 44px;
      color: white;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .seller-cta p {
      font-size: 16px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .btn-white {
      background: white;
      color: #18162A;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 15px;
      padding: 14px 32px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
      transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-white:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    .footer {
      padding: 48px 48px 32px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .footer-inner {
      max-width: 1344px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .footer-logo {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 18px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-primary), #A78BFA);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }
    .footer-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 24px;
    }
    .footer-links a {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .footer-social {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .footer-social-icon {
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .footer-social-icon:hover {
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .footer-social-icon svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
    .footer-copyright {
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 28px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      max-width: 1344px;
      margin-left: auto;
      margin-right: auto;
    }

    /* =============================================
       MOBILE OVERRIDES
       ============================================= */
    .mobile-frame .hero { padding: 48px 20px 40px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero h1 { font-size: 44px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-sub { font-size: 15px; max-width: 100%; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-search-bar { padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 14px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-search-bar input { font-size: 14px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-search-bar .search-submit { padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; }
    .mobile-frame .game-tabs { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
    .mobile-frame .game-tab { font-size: 12px; padding: 5px 12px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-stats {
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 12px 20px;
      border-radius: 16px;
    }
    .mobile-frame .hero-stat-sep { display: none; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-stat { font-size: 12px; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-ctas { flex-direction: column; width: 100%; }
    .mobile-frame .hero-ctas .btn { justify-content: center; }

    .mobile-frame .section { padding: 40px 20px; }
    .mobile-frame .game-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .mobile-frame .game-card-name { font-size: 16px; }
    .mobile-frame .game-card-count { font-size: 11px; }
    .mobile-frame .game-card-overlay { padding: 16px; }

    .mobile-frame .trending-strip { padding: 32px 0; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-strip .section-label { padding: 0 20px; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-scroll { padding: 0 20px 12px; gap: 14px; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-card { width: 140px; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-card-name { font-size: 12px; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-card-set { font-size: 11px; }
    .mobile-frame .trending-card-price { font-size: 13px; }

    .mobile-frame .trust-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .mobile-frame .trust-card { padding: 24px 20px; }
    .mobile-frame .trust-card-value { font-size: 26px; }
    .mobile-frame .trust-card-label { font-size: 13px; }

    .mobile-frame .seller-cta {
      margin: 0 20px;
      padding: 40px 24px;
      border-radius: 16px;
    }
    .mobile-frame .seller-cta h2 { font-size: 32px; }
    .mobile-frame .seller-cta p { font-size: 14px; }

    .mobile-frame .footer { padding: 32px 20px 24px; }
    .mobile-frame .footer-inner {
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 20px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .mobile-frame .footer-links { flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; }
    .mobile-frame .footer-copyright { margin-top: 16px; }

    /* Hide annotations on mobile */
    .mobile-frame .annotation { display: none; }
  </style>
</head>

# T01: Align all homepage components to wireframe pixel values

**Fixed HeroSection mobile bottom padding (48→40px) and SellerCTABanner section padding (missing top + wrong desktop bottom) to match wireframe.**

## What Happened

Compared all six homepage components against `storefront-homepage.html` wireframe CSS at both 1440px and 390px breakpoints. Most components were already pixel-perfect from S03 work. Found two deviations:

1. **HeroSection** mobile bottom padding was `48px` (from symmetric `py-[48px]`), wireframe specifies `40px`. Split into explicit `pb-[40px] pt-[48px]`.

2. **SellerCTABanner** section wrapper had no top padding and wrong desktop bottom padding. Wireframe wraps the CTA in a `.section` (64px 48px) with `padding-bottom: 80px` desktop / `48px` mobile. Added `pt-[40px] sm:pt-[64px]` and changed `sm:pb-[64px]` → `sm:pb-[80px]`.

GameSelectorGrid, GameTile, TrustSection, and TrendingStrip were already aligned — no changes needed.

## Verification

- `cd storefront && npx vitest run src/components/homepage/` — 6 files, 46 tests passed ✅
- `cd storefront && npx vitest run` — 76 files, 794 tests passed ✅
- `cd storefront && npm run build` — production build succeeded ✅

## Diagnostics

None — pure CSS class changes with no runtime behavior.

## Deviations

No task plan file existed; worked directly from slice plan must-haves and wireframe comparison.

## Known Issues

None.

- `storefront/src/components/homepage/HeroSection.tsx` — fixed mobile bottom padding from 48px to 40px, split py into explicit pt/pb
- `storefront/src/components/homepage/SellerCTABanner.tsx` — added section top padding (40px mobile / 64px desktop) and fixed desktop bottom padding (64px → 80px)
